allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('src/data/dsaSheets.json'\)\); ts=d['sheets'][0]['levels'][0]['topics']; print\('Topics:', [\(t['name'], len\(t['problems']\)\) for t in ts]\); ids=[p['id'] for t in ts for p in t['problems']]; print\('Total problem entries:', len\(ids\)\); import collections; dups={k:v for k,v in collections.Counter\(ids\).items\(\) if v>1}; print\('Duplicate IDs \(expected only str-8\):', dups\)")
